potential_missing.source_sentence: e-Med is a tool that helps keep track of and address all your personal medical needs.

potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall send notifications to restock medicines.
The system shall schedule monthly or yearly appointments with the family doctor.

missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall help keep track of and address all personal medical needs.
The system shall provide a record of medical history such as blood sugar levels, pressure levels, etc.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall schedule monthly or yearly appointments regularly with the family doctor.
hallucinations.reason: The source text does not mention 'regularly'.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall automatically contact emergency contacts in critical situations.
hallucinations.reason: The source text mentions 'pressing the emergency button will automatically contact your near and dear ones', but it does not explicitly state that this is a feature of the tool.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall provide reminders for taking medicines.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall send notifications to restock medicines.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are similar and can be combined into a single requirement.

duplicates.requirement_a: The system shall schedule monthly or yearly appointments with the family doctor.
duplicates.requirement_b: The system shall schedule monthly or yearly appointments regularly with the family doctor.
duplicates.reason: These two requirements are almost identical, but 'regularly' is not present in the original source text.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall keep a record of medical history using the Medical Notes feature.
ambiguities.reason: The source text mentions that e-Med helps maintain a good health routine, but it is unclear what specific features contribute to this.
